Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.propane.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/b7c3a32ea12e9c619600afff66ac36642b652def2aab2f5f9ce9f4b4417adad4/a7f299ac-07f9-4614-91b6-d75d9b6c9f74/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
